task_completion.description: Navigate to the Projects workspace in Nuxeo
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the Nuxeo platform with the 'Projects' workspace open.
The document view for 'System_Architecture.pdf' is visible in the Nuxeo web interface.

task_completion.description: Access the version history of the document
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'History' or 'Versions' tab is selected and visible within the document view.
The version history list is displayed, showing Version 1.0 and its author ('Senior Architect' or 'arch_lead').

task_completion.description: Save the username to the specified file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window showing the username 'arch_lead' being saved to '/home/ga/version_author.txt'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Nuxeo web interface to find the information
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent navigated the Nuxeo platform using a web browser, rather than using terminal commands (like curl) to query the API or database directly.

integrity.description: Agent checked the actual version history
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent explicitly opened the document's history/versions tab, rather than just copying the author from the document summary page (which shows the latest contributor).
The output file '/home/ga/version_author.txt' contains exactly 'arch_lead' without any additional text, sentences, or the display name.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target document 'System_Architecture.pdf' is located in the Nuxeo Projects workspace. Version 1.0 was created by the user with username 'arch_lead' (display name 'Senior Architect'). A later version was created by Administrator to obscure the original author on the summary page. The agent must save exactly 'arch_lead' to /home/ga/version_author.txt.
